meta.title: BEUR SEASON — Data-Driven Beauty Consulting
meta.description: The first Persian-speaking, data-driven beauty consultancy. Color-cycle and skin-tone analysis so every beauty choice is built precisely for your unique color season.

hero.subtitle: Every beauty decision grounded in knowledge, data and color science — from color-cycle analysis to a precise match with your skin tone. So no shade ever looks 'off' on you again.

values.title: Why BEUR SEASON
values.subtitle: We're not a product seller or a trend-chasing blogger — we're a scientific reference for skin color analysis.

items.title: Science-led
items.desc: Every recommendation is backed by data and research, not personal taste.

items.title: Honest by craft
items.desc: We tell you what truly suits you — not what you'd like to hear.

items.title: Trust-first
items.desc: Full transparency in methods and sources. You know why this color, for you.

items.title: Empowering
items.desc: Our goal is to make you capable — never dependent.

positioning.statement: The only Persian-speaking beauty consultant who builds your personal palette with the science of the color cycle and Color Season.
positioning.uvp: For beauty seekers and professionals who want smart beauty decisions — where color science and beauty meet.

aboutTeaser.title: An expert who tells the truth
aboutTeaser.body: Using color science and data-driven analysis, I help you choose colors truly made for you — not what merely looked good on someone else. My full story and résumé will live here soon.

about.mission: To empower individuals and beauty businesses through data-driven analysis and expert consulting — so every choice is smart, informed and effective.

colorDemo.title: Discover Your Color Season
colorDemo.subtitle: Upload a simple photo and our AI identifies your color season, then recommends the perfect hair, brow and makeup shades.

colorAnalysis.title: AI Color Analysis
colorAnalysis.subtitle: Upload your face photo to discover your color season and the best hair, brow and makeup shades for you.
colorAnalysis.uploadTitle: Drop your photo here or click to browse
colorAnalysis.uploadSubtitle: JPG, PNG or WEBP · Max 10 MB
colorAnalysis.disclaimer: This analysis is AI-generated. For a more precise result, we recommend a personal consultation.
colorAnalysis.demoNote: Demo result — set your API key for real analysis
colorAnalysis.orTakePhoto: Or take a photo with your camera
colorAnalysis.photoTipsTitle: For a more accurate analysis, follow these tips:
colorAnalysis.photoTip1: Natural daylight on your face — no flash or artificial light
colorAnalysis.photoTip2: Pull hair back so your face is fully visible
colorAnalysis.photoTip3: Light or no makeup — to reveal your true skin tone
colorAnalysis.photoTip5: Straight front-facing shot at a comfortable distance
